Explore Programs

Our Teachers

Stillwater's teachers bring decades of practice and study across multiple Buddhist traditions.

Sarah Morrison

Senior Teacher & Founder

Sarah has practised and studied within the Tibetan Buddhist tradition for over twenty-five years, with extended periods of training in India and Nepal. She holds a deep connection with both the Kagyu and Nyingma lineages and has completed two three-year retreats under the guidance of senior Tibetan masters.

Sarah is known for her ability to make the subtlest teachings accessible to contemporary Western students. She draws on both classical texts and her own sustained experience to offer teachings that are precise, warm, and immediately useful. She founded Stillwater in 2019 with the intention of creating a genuinely welcoming home for contemplative practice in the Hudson Valley.

When she is not teaching, Sarah leads silent retreats and writes on the relationship between meditation and mental health.

David Chen

Meditation Instructor

David came to meditation through his work as a clinical psychologist, where he observed first-hand the profound effects of mindfulness-based interventions on mental health. Seeking a deeper foundation, he spent five years studying with teachers in the Tibetan Gelug tradition and later trained in Soto Zen with teachers in Japan and the United States.

David brings a unique perspective that bridges the contemplative and scientific traditions. His teaching style is practical, evidence-informed, and rooted in a genuine appreciation of the classical sources. He leads Stillwater's Introduction to Meditation and Mindful Living courses, and is particularly skilled at working with those who come to practice through an interest in mental health and wellbeing.

David also leads mindfulness programmes for healthcare professionals and community organisations throughout the Hudson Valley.

Stillwater Dharma Center

A non-sectarian centre for meditation and contemplative practice,
open to all, rooted in kindness.

28 River Bend Lane, Woodstock, NY 12498
